metadata.name: Update Aircraft Weight and Balance after Modification

description: After a major modification (like adding a new satellite antenna), an engineer must update the aircraft's official weight and balance records.

nodes.task_description: Get the weight and location (moment arm) of all components that were added or removed during the modification.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a list of all weight changes.

nodes.task_description: Update the aircraft's master weight and balance sheet with these changes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately updates the master record.

nodes.task_description: Recalculate the aircraft's new empty weight and center of gravity and issue a revised weight and balance report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the new values and generates the official revised report.
